sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI WTR 47 of 2013 WTRs 43 to 46 of 2013 WTRs 48 to 54 of 2013 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For orders on CMA No.57/2013. 3. For orders on CMA No.58/2013. 4. For hearing of main case. 01.12.2025 Mr. Muhammad Din Qazi, advocate for the respondent. Matters are pending since 2013 without any progress despite passage of 12 years. Even today applicant remain unrepresented without any justification. It appears that the applicant is not interested in the present proceedings. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, the reference applications are dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Office is instructed to place copy hereof in the connected files. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
